summary.lv: Epic Frog, Rīgas tehnoloģiju uzņēmums, meklē datu inženieri savai komandai — lomu, kas atbild par datu konveijeriem un datu infrastruktūru.
summary.en: Epic Frog, a Riga-based tech company, is hiring a Data Engineer responsible for the data pipelines and data infrastructure behind the product.
